title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Mythos, its first Mythos-class model, which tops benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model demonstrates capabilities across vision, long-context tasks, and coding applications.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Mythos, described as its first Mythos-class model. The model tops benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, and the coverage spans its performance on vision, long-context tasks, and coding applications. The key takeaway: a new model positioned at the top of coding and frontier benchmarks, with demonstrated capabilities across multiple modalities.
